en: -♪♪ And welcome back to Celebrity Jeopardy!
ko: 유명인 퀴즈쇼에 다시 오신 것을 환영합니다.

en: Before we begin the double Jeopardy! round, I'd like to apologize to our Asian viewers.
ko: 더블 퀴즈 라운드를 시작하기 전에 아시아 시청자분들께 사과드리고 싶습니다.

en: We should have known having Chinese history as a category
ko: 중국 역사라는 주제가 불쾌한 억양을 초래할 것이라는 걸 알았어야 했습니다.

en: would lead to some highly offensive accents from our contestants.
That said, let's take a look at the score.
Sean Connery currently sits at negative $3,000.
And your mother currently sits on my face, Trebek.
ko: 그리고 당신의 어머니는 현재 내 얼굴 위에 있습니다, 트라박.

en: Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha!
Way too early for that. Way too early.
Yeah, um, it's like there hasn't been a lot up here, right?
But there's so much in here, and I just want to get it out, girl.
ko: 하지만 여기에는 정말 많은 것이 있고, 그냥 꺼내고 싶어요, 친구.
